title: Vision and Light
excerpt: Rules governing sight and obscured areas.
markdown:
# Vision and Light

Some adventuring tasks-such as noticing danger, hitting an enemy, and targeting certain spells-are affected by sight, so effects that obscure vision can hinder you, as explained in the **[[vision]]** rules.

### Interaction with Light
The environment's illumination level-**[[bright_light]]**, **[[dim_light]]**, or **[[darkness]]**-directly impacts a creature's ability to see and can create **[[obscured_areas]]**. Special abilities like **[[darkvision]]** or **[[special_senses]]** can mitigate these hindrances.
